# Purpose
This C header file declares two weak functions, [`app_request_render`](<#app_request_render>) and [`app_event_loop`](<#app_event_loop>), which are part of an application framework. The `#pragma once` directive ensures the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. The file includes two other headers, `applib/app.h` and `util/attributes.h`, which likely provide additional functionality or definitions used by the application. The weak attribute allows these functions to be overridden by other implementations, providing default behavior if no other implementation is provided.
